steps.name: precheck-operator
steps.plan: 确认 Tenant CRD（tenants.minio.min.io）已注册（operator 就位）

steps.name: apply-cr
steps.plan:
将 apply：
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: e2e-minio-env
  namespace: mb-e2e
type: Opaque
stringData:
  config.env: 'export MINIO_ROOT_USER="minioadmin"

    export MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD="minioadmin"

    '
---
apiVersion: minio.min.io/v2
kind: Tenant
metadata:
  name: e2e-minio
  namespace: mb-e2e
spec:
  image: minio/minio:RELEASE.2024-12-18T13-15-44Z
  configuration:
    name: e2e-minio-env
  requestAutoCert: false
  pools:
  - name: pool-0
    servers: 1
    volumesPerServer: 1
    volumeClaimTemplate:
      metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes:
        - ReadWriteOnce
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 2Gi

steps.name: register
steps.plan: 写管理元数据 + 快照，标记 Managed
steps.detail: 已登记实例 e2e-minio 为 Managed
